---
title: "collaborator_2_analysis"
author: Carolynn Harris
format: html
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

# load libraries
```{r}
#| warning: false
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```


# data input
```{r}
# lobster_traps <- read_csv("/home/charris/M-C-K/data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")

lobster_traps <- read_csv(here("data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv"))
lobster_traps <- read_csv("../data/Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")
```

# data explore 
```{r}
glimpse(lobster_traps)

summary(lobster_traps)

```

# data cleaning 
```{r}
# traps code for missing is -99999, change to "NA"
unique(lobster_traps$TRAPS)

lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>%
  mutate(TRAPS = replace(TRAPS, TRAPS < 0, NA))

unique(lobster_traps$TRAPS)
str(lobster_traps$TRAPS)
```


# remove NAPLES REEF (NAPL)
```{r}
subset <- lobster_traps %>%
  filter(SITE != "NAPL")

unique(subset$SITE)

subset2 <- lobster_traps %>%
  filter(SITE == "CARP",
         TRAPS > 20)
unique(subset2$SITE)
summary(subset2$TRAPS)

```
